response.reasoning: Role demands 15 years experience, director-level IC, recognized AI expertise, cloud/AI platform strategy, and ideally advanced AI degree. Candidate has ~16 years of dev experience since 2009/2010, mostly senior/staff IC roles (highest title 'Staff Software Engineer' at current role, started April 2025). Tech stack centers on full-stack web (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang, Ember, React), with some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq — but this is nascent, not a track record of recognized AI products/platforms. No Master's/PhD in AI, BS in CS (MIT listed). No evidence of director-level influence, advising strategic customers, or shaping cloud product future-state. No major cloud platform architecture leadership (some AWS CDK at Optilyz). Strong craftsmanship, TDD, teaching/workshops — good communication signal but at practitioner level, not principal/strategist level. Gap between role's 'recognized AI expert / Principal' bar and candidate's profile is substantial.
strengths: ~15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with broad polyglot range
Recent hands-on with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source founder of GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms or recognized AI expertise required for Principal AI Strategy role
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC, not director-level influence, customer advisory, or strategy work
Limited deep cloud-platform architecture experience; no advanced AI degree or research background

key_factors.factor: Lacks recognized AI expertise and AI products portfolio
No director-level strategy or customer-advisory experience
Solid 15+ years of full-stack engineering with recent AI-agent tooling exposure

response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and recent entry into AI-agent tooling, but the role requires a director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products, cloud platform vision, and customer-facing strategy work. The resume shows craftsmanship and breadth but not the strategic AI leadership profile this Principal role demands.
